---
title: "Carbon Capture and Storage: Bury the myth and focus on alternatives"
description: "Robin Lovelace and Luke Temple (2012). Carbon Capture and Storage: Bury the myth and focus on alternatives. *Metis*."
date: "2012-01-01"
title-block-banner: false
toc: false
citation-key: "lovelace_carbon_2012"
citation-type: "article-journal"
citation-type-label: "Journal Article"
venue: "Metis"
doi: ""
publication-url: ""
authors:
  - "Robin Lovelace"
  - "Luke Temple"
---

**Type:** Journal Article
**Venue:** Metis
**Year:** 2012

[BibTeX](entry.bib)

## Citation

Robin Lovelace and Luke Temple (2012). Carbon Capture and Storage: Bury the myth and focus on alternatives. *Metis*.

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@article{lovelace_carbon_2012,
  title = {Carbon {{Capture}} and {{Storage}}: Bury the Myth and Focus on Alternatives},
  author = {Lovelace, Robin and Temple, Luke},
  year = {2012},
  journal = {Metis},
  volume = {3},
  number = {September 2012},
  pages = {20--26},
  copyright = {CC0 1.0 Universal Public Domain Dedication}
}
```

## Notes

{{< include _notes.qmd >}}
